name: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking + Polar Express (82.14ms/step)
blurb: Systems optimization: 3.1% faster training (82.14ms vs 84.76ms) via Parameter Banking (3D contiguous weight banks), Polar Express (minimax-optimal orthogonalization, arXiv:2505.16932), and Parallel Muon (no DDP, post-backward reduce-scatter + local PE + async all-gather). 7,306 steps vs 7,079 in 600s. Identical pre-quant val_bpb 1.1421. Built on PR #315 by @jfprincz.
author: abaybektursun
